chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1027 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case 1.For hearing of CMA 6267/25 2.For hearing of main case 09-12-2025 Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G. **** Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
